name: Client Operating Model Phase 7 Simulation Runtime
outcome_goal: Produce the simulation runtime, automation firing, and verifier implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not declare simulation success without verifier proof.
Do not hide automation ambiguity in prose.

jobs.label: phase_07_simulation_runtime_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_07_simulation_runtime/PLAN.md. Cover execution of simulated actions, automation rule evaluation, state transition emission, assertion/verifier contracts, typed gaps, promotion blockers, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
